Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Benedikt Ahrens, Ralph Matthes

SubstitutionSystems

2015


************************************************************)


(** **********************************************************

Contents :

- Construction of a substitution system from an initial algebra
- Proof that the substitution system constructed from an
  initial algebra is an initial substitution system


version for simplified notion of HSS by Ralph Matthes (2022, 2023)
the file is very close to the homonymous file in the parent directory
basically, the changes in SimplifiedHSS.SubstitutionSystems are propagated


************************************************************)

Set Kernel Term Sharing.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.yoneda.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctorsComposition.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SimplifiedHSS.SubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.GenMendlerIteration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.RightKanExtension.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.GenMendlerIteration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.BicatOfCatsElementary.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Notation.
Local Open Scope subsys.

Local Open Scope cat.

Local Coercion alg_carrier : algebra_ob >-> ob.

Section category_Algebra.

Context  (C : category) (CP : BinCoproducts C).

Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .
Local Notation "'Ptd'" := (category_Ptd C).

Let CPEndC : BinCoproducts EndC := BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CP.
Let EndEndC := [EndC, EndC].
Let CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC.


Context (KanExt : ∏ Z : Ptd, GlobalRightKanExtensionExists _ _ (U Z) C).

Context (H : Presignature C C C).
Let θ := theta H.

Let Const_plus_H (X : EndC) : functor EndC EndC := Const_plus_H C CP H X.

Let Id_H :  functor [C, C] [C, C] := Id_H C CP H.

Let Alg : category := FunctorAlg Id_H.


Context (IA : Initial Alg).

Definition SpecializedGMIt (Z : Ptd) (X : EndC)
  :  ∏ (G : functor [C, C] [C, C])
       (ρ : [C, C] ⟦ G X, X ⟧)
       (θ : functor_composite Id_H (ℓ (U Z)) ⟹ functor_composite (ℓ (U Z)) G),
     ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) (` (InitialObject IA)), X ⟧,
            # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H (InitialObject IA)) · h
            =
            θ (` (InitialObject IA)) · # G h · ρ
   :=
  SpecialGenMendlerIteration _ _ IA EndC X _ (KanExt Z) .


Definition θ_in_first_arg (Z: Ptd)
  : functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) Z
    ⟹
    functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H) Z
  := nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ Z.

Definition InitAlg : Alg := InitialObject IA.

Definition ptdInitAlg : Ptd := ptd_from_alg InitAlg.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (runitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (runitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α
· BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
    (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
       (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (runitor_CAT (U Z))
    (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
  (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
     (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (runitor_CAT (U Z))
  (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
· # (pr1
       (CPEndEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z))) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ x : C,
(# (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α
 · BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
        (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
     (runitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))) x =
(BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
   (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
      (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
   (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
   (runitor_CAT (U Z))
   (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
 · # (pr1
        (CPEndEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z))) α) x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
(# (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α
 · BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
        (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
     (runitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))) c =
(BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
   (CPEndC (U Z ∙ functor_identity C)
      (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
   (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
   (runitor_CAT (U Z))
   (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
 · # (pr1
        (CPEndEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z))) α) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (functor_identity C)
  (H X)
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H X'))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H X')))
  (# H α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H X')))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (pr1 Z ∙ functor_identity C) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X'))
    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X'))
     · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (pr1 Z ∙ functor_identity C) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)))
  (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X)
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          X'))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z X')))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X
       X' α
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z X'))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 Z c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (pr1 Z ∙ H X') c)
    (identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (pr1 Z ∙ H X') c) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)
    (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
     · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)
    (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
     · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
         (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
            [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
            [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X') c)
    (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
     · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP 
         (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
            [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
            [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X') c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)
    (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
     · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c)
    (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
     · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
            Z X') c) = ?b
 apply BinCoproductOfArrows_comp. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
      · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c) =
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c)) =
identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
· (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c) =
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 Z c) =
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
identity (pr1 Z c)

    apply id_right.

· (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd

α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
· (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
· pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
identity (H X (Z c)) · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    apply pathsinv0, id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) Z))
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C] Ptd 
               [C, C] (θ_source H) Z)),
 is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z)) t) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) Z))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
[C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) X,
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) X ⟧

    exact (BinCoproductOfArrows EndC (CPEndC _ _) (CPEndC _ _) (runitor_CAT (U Z))
            (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X⊗Z):functor C C))).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z)),
 is_nat_trans (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z)) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (U Z) (id1_CAT C))
         (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (runitor_CAT (U Z))
      (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))
   :
   nat_trans_data (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)))
 exact (aux_iso_1_is_nat_trans Z).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z))) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z))) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
        (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
     (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z))) α
· BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
    (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
       (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
    (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
    (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
     (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
  (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
  (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
· # (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ x : C,
(# (pr1
      (CPEndEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
            (θ_source H) Z))) α
 · BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
        (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))
     (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
     (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X' ⊗ Z)))) x =
(BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C ∙ U Z)
      (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
   (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
   (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
   (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
 · # (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) α) x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        X'))
  (identity (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z X')))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z X X'
     α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z X'))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C ∙ pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X'))
    (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X'))
     · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X')))
    c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C ∙ pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))
  (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X)))
  (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H X))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (functor_identity C)
    (H X)
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H X'))
    (identity (functor_identity C)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H X')))
    (# H α
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (functor_identity C) (H X')))
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          X') c)
  (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          X') c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
    (identity (pr1 Z c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (pr1 Z ∙ H X') c)
    (identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (pr1 Z ∙ H X') c) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) 
         (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) 
         (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (pr1 Z ∙ H X) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
    (# H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
         (functor_identity C) (H X') (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)) =
?b
 apply BinCoproductOfArrows_comp. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X' (pr1 Z c)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c))
  (# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
   · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · identity (H X' (pr1 Z c))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows C (CP (pr1 Z c) (H X (pr1 Z c)))
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) (H X' (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
  (identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
  (identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c) =
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
· pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· identity (H X' (pr1 Z c)) =
identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · identity (pr1 Z c) =
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 Z c) · identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    apply id_right.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 (H X)) (identity (Z c))
· pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· identity (H X' (pr1 Z c)) =
identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (H X (Z c)) · pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· identity (H X' (pr1 Z c)) =
identity (H X (pr1 Z c)) · # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
pr1 (# H α) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· identity (H X' (pr1 Z c)) = # H α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    apply id_right.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z), Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z) ⟧

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C] Ptd 
               [C, C] (θ_source H) Z))
         (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z)) 
   (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) t) ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
[C, C]
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z) X, (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) X ⟧

    exact (BinCoproductOfArrows EndC (CPEndC _ _) (CPEndC _ _) (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
           (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X⊗Z):functor C C))).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (U Z))
         (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z)))
      (lunitor_CAT (U Z))
      (nat_trans_id (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z) : C ⟶ C)))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z)) (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)))
 exact (aux_iso_1_inv_is_nat_trans Z).
Defined.

(*
Definition G_Thm15 (X : EndC) := coproduct_functor _ _ CPEndC
                       (constant_functor _ _ X)
                       H.
 *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z)))
  (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)) : C ⟶ C))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z)))
  (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z))
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)) : C ⟶ C))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α
· nat_trans_id (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
nat_trans_id (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)))
· # (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α
· nat_trans_id (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
# (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α =
# (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ x : C,
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α x =
# (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) α x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        X'))
  (identity (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X')))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X'))) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X))
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))
  (identity (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X'))))
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X
        c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X) c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) = identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor 
  [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
  [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X' α c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) = identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
 apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
  [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X' α c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H
  (post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
   · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ c : C,
# H
  (post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
   · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

  (post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
   · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) =

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
· pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ x : C,
(post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
 · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) x =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
(post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
 · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 X) (identity (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (X (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z) ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z) ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z))
  (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z))
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C] Ptd 
               [C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
         (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_target H) Z))
   (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) t) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z))
  (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
[C, C]
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z) X,
(ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) X ⟧

    exact (nat_trans_id ((@BinCoproductObject EndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X⊗Z)) (CPEndC _ _) )
             : functor C C)).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z))
         (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_target H) Z))
   (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    nat_trans_id
      (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z)) : C ⟶ C))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))
     (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Const_plus_H (U Z)))
 exact (aux_iso_2_inv_is_nat_trans Z).
Defined.

Definition θ'_Thm15 (Z: Ptd)
  : EndEndC
    ⟦ BinCoproductObject
        (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) Z)),
      BinCoproductObject
        (CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H) Z)) ⟧
  := BinCoproductOfArrows
   EndEndC (CPEndEndC _ _) (CPEndEndC _ _)
   (identity (constant_functor EndC _ (U Z): functor_category EndC EndC))
   (θ_in_first_arg Z).

Definition ρ_Thm15 (Z: Ptd)(f : [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧)
  : [C, C] ⟦ BinCoproductObject (CPEndC (U Z) (H `InitAlg)), `InitAlg ⟧
  := @BinCoproductArrow
   EndC _ _  (CPEndC (U Z)
   (H (alg_carrier _ InitAlg))) (alg_carrier _ InitAlg) f
   (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC _ _) · (alg_map _ InitAlg)).

Definition SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 (Z: Ptd)(f : [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧)
  : ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) (` (InitialObject IA)), pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
           # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H (InitialObject IA)) · h
           =
           pr1 ((aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)) (` (InitialObject IA)) ·
