           # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h · ρ_Thm15 Z f
  := SpecializedGMIt Z (pr1 InitAlg) (Const_plus_H (U Z))
     (ρ_Thm15 Z f) (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z).

Definition bracket_Thm15 (Z: Ptd)(f : [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧)
  : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) (` (InitialObject IA)), `InitAlg ⟧
  := pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)).

Notation "⦃ f ⦄" := (bracket_Thm15 _ f) (at level 0).

(* we prove the individual components for ease of compilation *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
f = # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
f = # (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
∏ x : C,
f x = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq: (λ h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
 pr1
   (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
   `IA · # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h · 
 ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq': (λ m : [C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA,
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv Z
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA · m)
  (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))) =
(λ m : [C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA,
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv Z
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA · m)
  (pr1
     (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
      · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
   · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
       (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
   · ρ_Thm15 Z f)
f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq': BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
  (CPEndC
     (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
· (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
     (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
       [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
       (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
       (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
          [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
          (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
          (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
          (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
           · aux_iso_2_inv Z))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
  (CPEndC
     (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows 
     [C, C]
     (CPEndC
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
          [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z)
       (CPEndEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
             [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
       (identity
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 Z))
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (CPEndEndC
               (constant_functor 
                  [C, C, C] 
                  [C, C, C] 
                  (pr1 Z))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg 
                  [C, C, C]
                  (precategory_Ptd C)
                  [C, C, C] 
                  (θ_target H) Z)))
       (θ_in_first_arg Z
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (CPEndEndC
               (constant_functor 
                  [C, C, C] 
                  [C, C, C] 
                  (pr1 Z))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg 
                  [C, C, C]
                  (precategory_Ptd C)
                  [C, C, C] 
                  (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
   · nat_trans_id
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
          (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
   · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (pr1 Z)) H
       (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
       (pr1 InitAlg)
       (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
          [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
          (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
          (ψ_from_comps 
             [C, C] Id_H 
             [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
             (ℓ (pr1 Z))
             (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
             (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
             (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
              · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
   · ρ_Thm15 Z f)
f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1': (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC (pr1 Z)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
              [C, C, C] 
              (precategory_Ptd C) 
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  (BinCoproductOfArrows 
     [C, C]
     (CPEndC
        (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
        (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
   · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
        (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
      · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
          [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
          (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
          (ψ_from_comps 
             [C, C] Id_H 
             [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
             (ℓ (pr1 Z))
             (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
             (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
             (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
              · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC (pr1 Z)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
              [C, C, C] 
              (precategory_Ptd C) 
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  (BinCoproductOfArrows 
     [C, C]
     (CPEndC
        (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
        (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
        [C, C]
        (CPEndC
           (functor_compose 
              (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
           (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
        (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
        (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
             [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
             [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z)
          (CPEndEndC
             (constant_functor 
                [C, C, C] 
                [C, C, C] 
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg 
                [C, C, C] 
                (precategory_Ptd C) 
                [C, C, C] 
                (θ_target H) Z))
          (identity
             (constant_functor 
                [C, C, C] 
                [C, C, C] 
                (pr1 Z))
           · BinCoproductIn1
               (CPEndEndC
                  (constant_functor 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     (pr1 Z))
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg
                     [C, C, C]
                     (precategory_Ptd C)
                     [C, C, C] 
                     (θ_target H) Z)))
          (θ_in_first_arg Z
           · BinCoproductIn2
               (CPEndEndC
                  (constant_functor 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     (pr1 Z))
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg
                     [C, C, C]
                     (precategory_Ptd C)
                     [C, C, C] 
                     (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
      · nat_trans_id
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
             CP (pr1 Z) 
             (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
      · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
             CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 Z)) H
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
          (pr1 InitAlg)
          (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
             [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
             (KanExt Z)
             (ψ_from_comps 
                [C, C] Id_H 
                [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
                (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                 · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
      · ρ_Thm15 Z f))
f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
         (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
           [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps 
              [C, C] Id_H 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC
            (functor_compose 
               (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data
               (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg
              [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C)
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                 [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C)
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
              C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
              C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg)
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z
                  · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
f c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

(* match goal right in the beginning in contrast with earlier approach - suggestion by Benedikt *)
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
         (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
           [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps 
              [C, C] Id_H 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC
            (functor_compose 
               (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data
               (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg
              [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C)
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                 [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C)
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
              C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
              C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg)
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z
                  · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
f c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
         `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
         (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z))) · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))
  c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
         (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
           [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps 
              [C, C] Id_H 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC
            (functor_compose 
               (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data
               (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg
              [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C)
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                 [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C)
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
              C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
              C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg)
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z
                  · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C, C] 
              (precategory_Ptd C) 
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (precategory_Ptd C) 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (precategory_Ptd C) 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (precategory_Ptd C) 
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H 
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) 
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg) 
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) 
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c


  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
         (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
           [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps 
              [C, C] Id_H 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC
            (functor_compose 
               (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data
               (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg
              [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C)
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                 [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C)
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
              C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
              C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg)
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z
                  · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
f c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
         `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
         (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z))) · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))
  c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
         `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
         (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z))) · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))
  c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA)
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)
        (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
        (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z `IA)
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
          (identity (pr1 Z)
           · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C]
               [C, C] CPEndC
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (pr1 Z))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                  (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
          (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd
             [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
           · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C]
               [C, C] CPEndC
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (pr1 Z))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                  (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · identity
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
          (identity (pr1 Z)
           · BinCoproductIn1
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                  (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
          (# H
             (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
                (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                   (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                   (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                   (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                    · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
           · BinCoproductIn2
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                  (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)
        (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
        (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_source H) Z `IA)
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
          (identity (pr1 Z)
           · BinCoproductIn1
               (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                     (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
          (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd
             [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
           · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C]
               [C, C] CPEndC
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (pr1 Z))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                  (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                  (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · identity
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
          (identity (pr1 Z)
           · BinCoproductIn1
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                  (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
          (# H
             (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
                (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                   (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                   (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                   (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                    · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
           · BinCoproductIn2
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                  (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
        (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)
        (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
        (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z `IA)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
           (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd
              [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
            · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C]
                [C, C] CPEndC
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (pr1 Z))
                (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                   (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                   (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
         · (identity
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
            · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
                 (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                    (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
                 (identity (pr1 Z)
                  · BinCoproductIn1
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (# H
                    (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                       (KanExt Z)
                       (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H
                          [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
                          (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                          (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                          (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                          (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                           · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
                  · BinCoproductIn2
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
               · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
                   (BinCoproductIn2
                      (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                         (H `InitAlg))
                    · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
(lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                   (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                   (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (identity
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
              (identity (pr1 Z)
               · BinCoproductIn1
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
              (# H
                 (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (KanExt Z)
                    (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                       (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                       (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                       (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                        · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
               · BinCoproductIn2
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
            · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
                (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                      (H `InitAlg))
                 · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                   (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                   (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (identity
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
              (identity (pr1 Z)
               · BinCoproductIn1
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
              (# H
                 (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (KanExt Z)
                    (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                       (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                       (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                       (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                        · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
               · BinCoproductIn2
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
            · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
                (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                      (H `InitAlg))
                 · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                   (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                   (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (identity
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
              (identity (pr1 Z)
               · BinCoproductIn1
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
              (# H
                 (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (KanExt Z)
                    (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                       (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                       (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                       (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                        · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
               · BinCoproductIn2
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
            · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
                (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                      (H `InitAlg))
                 · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (identity
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
           (# H
              (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
                 (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                    (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                    (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                     · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H `InitAlg))
              · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (identity
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
           (# H
              (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
                 (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                    (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                    (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                     · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H `InitAlg))
              · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z `IA)))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (identity
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
           (# H
              (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
                 (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                    (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                    (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                     · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H `InitAlg))
              · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA))) c
· (identity
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
        (# H
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `IA)) c
· (identity
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
        (# H
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

    
C: category

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `IA)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
     (# H
        (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
