GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
f c = f c

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
         (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
           [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps 
              [C, C] Id_H 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC
            (functor_compose 
               (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data
               (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg
              [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C)
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                 [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C)
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
              C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
              C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg)
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z
                  · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
         `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
         (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z))) · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))
  c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq1'_inst: (BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C
         (pr1 Z) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
           [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps 
              [C, C] Id_H 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
         [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
         [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
      [C, C]
      (CPEndC
         (functor_compose 
            (id1_CAT C) 
            (pr1 Z)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data 
            (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (BinCoproductOfArrows 
         [C, C]
         (CPEndC
            (functor_compose 
               (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
            (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
         (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data
               (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
       · coproduct_nat_trans_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg
              [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C)
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_source H) Z)
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                 [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C)
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (θ_target H) Z))
           (identity
              (constant_functor
                 [C, C, C] 
                 [C, C, C] 
                 (pr1 Z))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           (θ_in_first_arg Z
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndEndC
                   (constant_functor
                      [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] 
                      (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg
                      [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C)
                      [C, C, C]
                      (θ_target H) Z)))
           `IA
       · nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data
              C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
       · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
              C C CP)
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           (pr1 InitAlg)
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
              [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) 
              (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps 
                 [C, C] Id_H 
                 [C, C] 
                 (pr1 InitAlg)
                 (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                 (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z
                  · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
         `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z)
         (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(BinCoproductIn1
   (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
         `IA))
 · (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (id1_CAT C) (pr1 Z))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z)
         (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(lunitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z)
     (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
       (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
       (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
          (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
          (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
          (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
    c = (# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (η InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1
        (InitialArrow IA
           (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
              (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                 (pr1 InitAlg))
              (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
                 (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                    (CPEndC
                       (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                          (id1_CAT C))
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                          (H
                             (Core.right_adjoint ...
                                ...))))
                  · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                      [C, C] CPEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_source H) Z)
                      (CPEndEndC
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                         (functor_fix_snd_arg
                            [C, C, C]
                            (precategory_Ptd C)
                            [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                      (identity
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       · BinCoproductIn1
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (θ_in_first_arg Z
                       · BinCoproductIn2
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · nat_trans_id
                      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H
                            (pr1 Z
                             ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                                 (KanExt Z)
                                 (pr1 InitAlg))))
                  · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
                      [C, C] [C, C]
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP)
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                      (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))
                      (pr1 InitAlg)
                      (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                         (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
          (pr1 InitAlg) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1
     (InitialArrow IA
        (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
           (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C))
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H
                          (Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
               · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                   [C, C] CPEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_source H) Z)
                   (CPEndEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_target H) Z))
                   (identity
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    · BinCoproductIn1
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (θ_in_first_arg Z
                    · BinCoproductIn2
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                      (pr1 InitAlg))
               · nat_trans_id
                   (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (pr1 Z
                          ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                              (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
               · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                   [C, C]
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP)
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                   (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                      (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
               · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
       (pr1 InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1
        (InitialArrow IA
           (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
              (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                 (pr1 InitAlg))
              (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
                 (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                    (CPEndC
                       (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                          (id1_CAT C))
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                          (H
                             (Core.right_adjoint ...
                                ...))))
                  · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                      [C, C] CPEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_source H) Z)
                      (CPEndEndC
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                         (functor_fix_snd_arg
                            [C, C, C]
                            (precategory_Ptd C)
                            [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                      (identity
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       · BinCoproductIn1
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (θ_in_first_arg Z
                       · BinCoproductIn2
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · nat_trans_id
                      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H
                            (pr1 Z
                             ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                                 (KanExt Z)
                                 (pr1 InitAlg))))
                  · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
                      [C, C] [C, C]
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP)
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                      (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))
                      (pr1 InitAlg)
                      (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                         (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
          (pr1 InitAlg) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1
     (InitialArrow IA
        (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
           (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C))
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H
                          (Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
               · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                   [C, C] CPEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_source H) Z)
                   (CPEndEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_target H) Z))
                   (identity
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    · BinCoproductIn1
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (θ_in_first_arg Z
                    · BinCoproductIn2
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                      (pr1 InitAlg))
               · nat_trans_id
                   (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (pr1 Z
                          ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                              (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
               · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                   [C, C]
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP)
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                   (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                      (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
               · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
       (pr1 InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1
        (InitialArrow IA
           (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
              (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                 (pr1 InitAlg))
              (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
                 (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                    (CPEndC
                       (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                          (id1_CAT C))
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                          (H
                             (Core.right_adjoint ...
                                ...))))
                  · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                      [C, C] CPEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_source H) Z)
                      (CPEndEndC
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                         (functor_fix_snd_arg
                            [C, C, C]
                            (precategory_Ptd C)
                            [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                      (identity
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       · BinCoproductIn1
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (θ_in_first_arg Z
                       · BinCoproductIn2
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · nat_trans_id
                      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H
                            (pr1 Z
                             ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                                 (KanExt Z)
                                 (pr1 InitAlg))))
                  · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
                      [C, C] [C, C]
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP)
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                      (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))
                      (pr1 InitAlg)
                      (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                         (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
          (pr1 InitAlg) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1
     (InitialArrow IA
        (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
           (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C))
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H
                          (Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
               · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                   [C, C] CPEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_source H) Z)
                   (CPEndEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_target H) Z))
                   (identity
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    · BinCoproductIn1
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (θ_in_first_arg Z
                    · BinCoproductIn2
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                      (pr1 InitAlg))
               · nat_trans_id
                   (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (pr1 Z
                          ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                              (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
               · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                   [C, C]
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP)
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                   (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                      (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
               · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
       (pr1 InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1
        (InitialArrow IA
           (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
              (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                 (pr1 InitAlg))
              (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
                 (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                    (CPEndC
                       (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                          (id1_CAT C))
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                          (H
                             (Core.right_adjoint ...
                                ...))))
                  · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                      [C, C] CPEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_source H) Z)
                      (CPEndEndC
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                         (functor_fix_snd_arg
                            [C, C, C]
                            (precategory_Ptd C)
                            [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                      (identity
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       · BinCoproductIn1
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (θ_in_first_arg Z
                       · BinCoproductIn2
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · nat_trans_id
                      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H
                            (pr1 Z
                             ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                                 (KanExt Z)
                                 (pr1 InitAlg))))
                  · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
                      [C, C] [C, C]
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP)
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                      (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))
                      (pr1 InitAlg)
                      (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                         (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
          (pr1 InitAlg) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1
     (InitialArrow IA
        (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
           (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C))
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H
                          (Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
               · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                   [C, C] CPEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_source H) Z)
                   (CPEndEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_target H) Z))
                   (identity
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    · BinCoproductIn1
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (θ_in_first_arg Z
                    · BinCoproductIn2
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                      (pr1 InitAlg))
               · nat_trans_id
                   (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (pr1 Z
                          ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                              (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
               · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                   [C, C]
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP)
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                   (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                      (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
               · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
       (pr1 InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1
        (InitialArrow IA
           (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
              (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                 (pr1 InitAlg))
              (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
                 (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                    (CPEndC
                       (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                          (id1_CAT C))
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                       (pr1 Z
                        ∙ H
                            (Core.right_adjoint (...)
                               (...))))
                    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                          (H
                             (Core.right_adjoint ...
                                ...))))
                  · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                      [C, C] CPEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_source H) Z)
                      (CPEndEndC
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                         (functor_fix_snd_arg
                            [C, C, C]
                            (precategory_Ptd C)
                            [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                      (identity
                         (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                            [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       · BinCoproductIn1
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (θ_in_first_arg Z
                       · BinCoproductIn2
                           (CPEndEndC
                              (constant_functor
                                 [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                                 (...))
                              (functor_fix_snd_arg
                                 [C, C, C] (...)
                                 [C, C, C] (...) Z)))
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · nat_trans_id
                      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C
                         C CP (pr1 Z)
                         (H
                            (pr1 Z
                             ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                                 (KanExt Z)
                                 (pr1 InitAlg))))
                  · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
                      [C, C] [C, C]
                      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
                         C CP)
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                      (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))
                      (pr1 InitAlg)
                      (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                         (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
                  · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
          (pr1 InitAlg) c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1
     (InitialArrow IA
        (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
           (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C))
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                    (pr1 Z
                     ∙ H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H
                          (Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
               · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C]
                   [C, C] CPEndC
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                      (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                      (θ_source H) Z)
                   (CPEndEndC
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                         (θ_target H) Z))
                   (identity
                      (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                         [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    · BinCoproductIn1
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (θ_in_first_arg Z
                    · BinCoproductIn2
                        (CPEndEndC
                           (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                              [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                           (functor_fix_snd_arg
                              [C, C, C]
                              (precategory_Ptd C)
                              [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                   (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                      (pr1 InitAlg))
               · nat_trans_id
                   (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                      CP (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (pr1 Z
                          ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                              (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
               · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                   [C, C]
                   (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                      CP)
                   (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                      [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                         (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                   (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                      (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
               · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
       (pr1 InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1
    (InitialArrow IA
       (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
          (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
          (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
             (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                (CPEndC
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (id1_CAT C))
                   (pr1 Z
                    ∙ H
                        (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                           (pr1 InitAlg))))
                (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z
                    ∙ H
                        (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                           (pr1 InitAlg))))
                (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
              · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
                  CPEndC
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                     (θ_source H) Z)
                  (CPEndEndC
                     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                        [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                        (θ_target H) Z))
                  (identity
                     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                        [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   · BinCoproductIn1
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                  (θ_in_first_arg Z
                   · BinCoproductIn2
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                  (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                     (pr1 InitAlg))
              · nat_trans_id
                  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                     CP (pr1 Z)
                     (H
                        (pr1 Z
                         ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
              · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                  [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                  (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                     (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                        (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                  (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                     (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
              · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
    (pr1 InitAlg) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1
    (InitialArrow IA
       (AlgConstr [C, C] Id_H
          (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
          (Core.φ_adj (pr2 (KanExt Z))
             (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                (CPEndC
                   (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                      (id1_CAT C))
                   (pr1 Z
                    ∙ H
                        (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                           (pr1 InitAlg))))
                (CPEndC (pr1 Z)
                   (pr1 Z
                    ∙ H
                        (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                           (pr1 InitAlg))))
                (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                      (H
                         (Core.right_adjoint
                            (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg)))))
              · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
                  CPEndC
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                     (θ_source H) Z)
                  (CPEndEndC
                     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                        [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                        (θ_target H) Z))
                  (identity
                     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                        [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                   · BinCoproductIn1
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                  (θ_in_first_arg Z
                   · BinCoproductIn2
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)))
                  (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                     (pr1 InitAlg))
              · nat_trans_id
                  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C
                     CP (pr1 Z)
                     (H
                        (pr1 Z
                         ∙ Core.right_adjoint
                             (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))))
              · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C]
                  [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
                  (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                     (Core.right_adjoint (KanExt Z)
                        (pr1 InitAlg))) (pr1 InitAlg)
                  (Core.counit_from_left_adjoint
                     (KanExt Z) (pr1 InitAlg))
              · ρ_Thm15 Z f)))) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· Core.counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 (KanExt Z))
    (pr1 InitAlg) c

(*    apply maponpaths. *)
    apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg =
# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg =
# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
∏ x : C,
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) x =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq: (λ h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 # (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
 pr1
   (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
   `IA · # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h · 
 ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq': (λ m : [C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA,
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv Z
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA · m)
  (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))) =
(λ m : [C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA,
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv Z
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA · m)
  (pr1
     (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
      · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
   · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
       (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
   · ρ_Thm15 Z f)
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

 (*        simpl in h_eq'. (* until here same as in previous lemma *) *)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq': (λ m : [C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA,
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv Z
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA · m)
  (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))) =
(λ m : [C, C] ⟦ (Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA,
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 (aux_iso_1_inv Z
  :
  CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg 
       [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
       (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
  Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA · m)
  (pr1
     (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
      · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
   · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
       (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
   · ρ_Thm15 Z f)
h_eq2': (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (U Z) `IA)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C] Ptd 
              [C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
   · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
      · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (U Z) `IA)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C] Ptd 
              [C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
   · (pr1
        (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
         · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
      · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
          (pr1
             (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
      · ρ_Thm15 Z f))
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2': (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (U Z) `IA)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C] Ptd 
              [C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
   · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
      · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (U Z) `IA)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C] Ptd 
              [C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
   · (pr1
        (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
         · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
      · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
          (pr1
             (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
      · ρ_Thm15 Z f))
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2': (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (U Z) `IA)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C] Ptd 
              [C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
   · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
      · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C] [C, C] 
              (U Z) `IA)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C] Ptd 
              [C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA),
       pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA)) · m)
  ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
    :
    CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z) ⟹ 
    Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
   · (pr1
        (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
         · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
      · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
          (pr1
             (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
      · ρ_Thm15 Z f))
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1
           (pr1
              (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
          · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15
                    Z f))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1
           (pr1
              (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
          · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15
                    Z f))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd

   (CPEndC

  c =

   (CPEndC

      (functor_fix_snd_arg
