  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1
           (pr1
              (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
          · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15
                    Z f))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv Z `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
         `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

CP: BinCoproducts C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1
           (pr1
              (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
          · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15
                    Z f))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv Z `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
         `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv Z `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
         `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg) c =
(nat_trans_id (θ_source H (`IA ⊗ Z))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (`IA ⊗ Z)))) c
· (pr1 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
     `IA
   · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
       (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
   · ρ_Thm15 Z f) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c · # H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
identity (H `IA (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · identity
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
       (# H
          (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
             (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                 · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c · # H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
identity (H `IA (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
       (# H
          (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
             (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                 · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c · # H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
       (# H
          (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
             (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
             (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                 · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
           (# H
              (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
                 (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                    (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
                    (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                    (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                     · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                   (H `InitAlg))
              · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
(nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
 · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
        (# H
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
identity (H `IA (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
        (# H
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
        (# H
           (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
              (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
              (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
                 (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
                 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
                  · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
     (# H
        (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
(θ (`IA,, Z)
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
     (# H
        (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
           (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
              (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
              (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
               · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (# H
     (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
        (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
        (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
           (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
           (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
theta H (`InitAlg ⊗ Z) c
· (# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· ((# H
      (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
         (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
         (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (pr1 Z))
            (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
            (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
             · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
    · BinCoproductIn2
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
(# H
   (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
      (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
      (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
         (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
         (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) = 
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
?b =
(# H
   (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA 
      [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
      (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
      (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
         (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP 
        (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
    (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
# H ⦃ f ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
# H
  (preIt [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (KanExt Z)
     (ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
        (ℓ (pr1 Z)) (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
        (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
        (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)))
  c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c

    apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.

(* alternative with slightly less precise control: *)
(*            do 4 rewrite <- assoc. *)
(*            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir. *)
(*            rewrite id_left. *)
(*            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir. *)
(*            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right_in_ctx_dir. *)
(*            unfold nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data. *)
(*            rewrite id_left. *)
(*            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes_right_in_double_ctx_dir. *)
(*            do 2 rewrite <- assoc. *)
(*            apply maponpaths. *)
(*            apply maponpaths. *)
(*            apply pathsinv0. *)
(*            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. *)
(* *)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1
           (pr1
              (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
          · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15
                    Z f))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv Z `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z)
         `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))
       · ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
h_eq2'_inst: (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1
           (pr1
              (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f)))))
  c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · ((aux_iso_1_inv Z
     :
     CPEndEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C] [C, C] 
          (U Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) Z)
     ⟹ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z)) `IA
    · (pr1
         (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z
          · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
       · # (Const_plus_H (U Z))
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15
                    Z f))) · 
       ρ_Thm15 Z f))) c
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv Z `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z) `IA)
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) Z `IA))
 · (aux_iso_1_inv Z `IA
    · (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
       · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
(nat_trans_id (θ_source H (`IA ⊗ Z))
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (`IA ⊗ Z)))) c
· (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (U Z) (θ_source H (`IA ⊗ Z)))
  c
· (# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
   · pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))) c =
(# (pr1 (ℓ (U Z))) (τ InitAlg) · ⦃ f ⦄) c

    apply assoc.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
f = η InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg
· # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg = 
τ InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
f = η InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄
 exact (bracket_Thm15_ok_part1 Z f).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · τ InitAlg =
τ InitAlg •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄
 exact (bracket_Thm15_ok_part2 Z f).
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f ⦃ f ⦄

CP: BinCoproducts C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
