SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f ⦃ f ⦄

  apply bracket_Thm15_ok.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
∏
t : ∑ h : [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
    bracket_property
      (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
t = ⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
∏
t : ∑ h : [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧,
    bracket_property
      (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
t = ⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
h',, h'_eq = ⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
isPredicate
  (bracket_property
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
pr1 (h',, h'_eq) =
pr1 (⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
isPredicate
  (bracket_property
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
x: [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
isaprop
  (bracket_property
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f x)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
x: [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
isaprop
  (alg_map (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H) InitAlg
   •• U Z · x =
   BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (U Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) Z `InitAlg))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (U Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z `InitAlg)) (identity (U Z))
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (U Z)
          (H (U Z ∙ `InitAlg)))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (U Z)
          (H `InitAlg)) (identity (U Z)) (# H x)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (U Z)
          (H `InitAlg)) f (τ InitAlg))

    apply (isaset_nat_trans (homset_property C)).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
pr1 (h',, h'_eq) =
pr1 (⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
h' = ⦃ f ⦄

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
h' = ⦃ f ⦄

(*    destruct h'_eq as [h'_eq1 h'_eq2]. *)
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
h' = pr1 (pr1 (SpecializedGMIt_Thm15 Z f))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h' =
pr1 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
· # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h' · ρ_Thm15 Z f

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
∏ x : C,
(# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h') x =
(pr1 (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z) `IA
 · # (Const_plus_H (U Z)) h' · ρ_Thm15 Z f) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 InitAlg)))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H (pr1 InitAlg))))
    (# H h'
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  ((nat_trans_id
      (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
    · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z c)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA c))
    ((identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
    ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
    ((identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
    ((# H h'
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    ((BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z c)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA c))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA c)
    ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
    ((# H h'
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    ((BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z c)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA c))
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA c)
    ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
    ((# H h'
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    ((BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c)
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c)
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
           [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
        [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C, C] 
              (precategory_Ptd C) 
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) 
                 (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) 
          (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · 
            alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
?b =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c)
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c)
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c)
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c))) = ?b
 apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
  ((runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
    · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     c
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z `IA c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA c)
        ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
            (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
          · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
      · (BinCoproductArrow
           (CP (pr1 Z c)
              (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
           ((# H h'
             · BinCoproductIn2
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                    (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
             ((BinCoproductIn2
                 (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                    (H `InitAlg))
               · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))))
  (BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_source H) Z `IA c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA c)
        ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
            (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
          · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
      · (BinCoproductArrow
           (CP (pr1 Z c)
              (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
           ((# H h'
             · BinCoproductIn2
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                    (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
             ((BinCoproductIn2
                 (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                    (H `InitAlg))
               · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
           [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
        [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg 
           [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
           [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
           (constant_functor 
              [C, C, C] 
              [C, C, C] 
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg 
              [C, C, C] 
              (precategory_Ptd C) 
              [C, C, C] 
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) 
                 (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) 
          (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · 
            alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq1: f = η InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq1: f = η InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq1: f = η InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c = (η InitAlg •• U Z · h') c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg)
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
          CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H)
    InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
h' c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
          CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H)
    InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
h' c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
           C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H)
     InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c)
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
           C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H)
     InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c)
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) = 
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
           C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H)
     InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c)
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
  (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
        (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
           [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
        [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP 
          (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
             [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
           (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP 
             (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) 
          (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) 
             (H `InitAlg) c · 
           alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
           C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H)
     InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c)
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) = 
?b
 eapply pathsinv0; exact h'_eq1_inst. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
