GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq1_inst: f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
           C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H)
     InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c)
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA) c)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
        (# H h' c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
           · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA)
  c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
     (# H h' c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
       (f c)
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
f c = f c

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq: bracket_property_parts
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
h'_eq2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
  `InitAlg · # H h' · τ InitAlg =
τ InitAlg •• U Z · h'
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq2_inst: (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
   [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z
   `InitAlg · # H h' · τ InitAlg) c =
(τ InitAlg •• U Z · h') c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq2_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · 
# H h' c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `InitAlg) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
             C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       InitAlg c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg)
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
          CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H)
    InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
h' c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq2_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · 
# H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
             C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       InitAlg c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
          CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H)
    InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
h' c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C) c)
     ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h' c) =

· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)

           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

        (constant_functor

        CPEndC

           CPEndC

              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
h'_eq2_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
     (H `InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
        [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C
           C CP)
        (constant_functor 
           [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H)
     InitAlg (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · 
   h' c) =
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · 
# H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat
             C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       InitAlg c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · # H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · # H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
        CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
        ((# H h'
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c)) (f c)
          ((BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
             c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · # H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (pr1 InitAlg))) c)
     ((# H h'
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
       (f c)
       ((BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
         · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `InitAlg c · # H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA c
· (# H h'
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H (pr1 InitAlg)))) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    ((BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
θ (`InitAlg,, Z) c · # H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (# H h' c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧

θ (`InitAlg,, Z) c
· (# H h' c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (# H h' c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
       (f c)
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c))

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧

· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
# H h' c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c) =
# H h' c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
       (f c)
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
h': [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ pr1 InitAlg, pr1 InitAlg ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H (pr1 InitAlg)) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `InitAlg c))
    (f c)
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg c) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `InitAlg c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) InitAlg c

      apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
bracket θ InitAlg

CP: BinCoproducts C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
bracket θ InitAlg

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
bracket_at C CP H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
∑
h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          h : [C, C, C] ⟦ 
              U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
          bracket_property
            (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C] Ptd 
               [C, C] (θ_source H) 
               (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
         `InitAlg ⟧,
     bracket_property
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
∑
h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧,
bracket_property
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
[C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
(λ h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
       `InitAlg ⟧,
 bracket_property
   (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
      [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
      (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h) 
  ?pr1

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
[C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C], `InitAlg ⟧
 exact (bracket_Thm15 Z f).
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
(λ h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
       `InitAlg ⟧,
 bracket_property
   (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
      (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h)
  ⦃ f ⦄
 exact (bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f).
       (* B: better to prove the whole outside, and apply it here *)
     (* when the first components were not opaque, the following proof
        became extremely slow *)
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitAlg ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
              `InitAlg ⟧,
          bracket_property
            (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg
            f h,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     h : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `InitAlg : [C, C, C],
         `InitAlg ⟧,
     bracket_property
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) InitAlg f h,
 t = cntr) (⦃ f ⦄,, bracket_Thm15_ok_cor Z f)
 simpl; apply foo'.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
hss_category CP H

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

  red. (* FORBIDDEN, otherwise universe problem when checking the definition *)
  unfold hss_precategory; simpl.
*)
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
bracket (theta H) InitAlg

  exact bracket_for_InitAlg.
Defined.


Local Definition Ghat : EndEndC := Const_plus_H (pr1 InitAlg).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
C', D: category
d, d': D
m: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
[C', D] ⟦ constant_functor C' D d,
constant_functor C' D d' ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
C', D: category
d, d': D
m: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
[C', D] ⟦ constant_functor C' D d,
constant_functor C' D d' ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
C', D: category
d, d': D
m: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
is_nat_trans (constant_functor C' D d)
  (constant_functor C' D d') (λ _ : C', m)

  abstract (
    intros ? ? ? ;
    intermediate_path m ;
    [
    apply id_left |
    apply pathsinv0 ;
  apply id_right] ).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z),
CPEndEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H)
     Z) ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) Z),
CPEndEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_target H)
     Z) ⟧

  exact (BinCoproductOfArrows EndEndC (CPEndEndC _ _) (CPEndEndC _ _)
                           (constant_nat_trans _ _ _ _ f)
                           (θ_in_first_arg Z)).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z),
CPEndEndC (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (U Z))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     Z) ⟧

  exact (aux_iso_1 Z).
Defined.



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           X) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))
      :
      C ⟶ C))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
  (λ X : [C, C],
   nat_trans_id
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           X) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))
      :
      C ⟶ C))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α
· nat_trans_id
    (CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
          X') (θ_target H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
nat_trans_id
  (CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) X)
     (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))) · # (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α
· nat_trans_id
    (CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
          X') (θ_target H (X' ⊗ Z))) =
# (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α = # (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ x : C,
# (pr1
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z))) α x =
# (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) α x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X)
  (CPEndC (pr1 InitAlg)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        X'))
  (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (pr1 InitAlg)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X')))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (pr1 InitAlg)
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z X'))) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
  (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X))
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))
  (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X'))))
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg)
          (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')))) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X
        c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X'
     α c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          X') c) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X) c))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)
  (# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) X')) c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor 
  [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
  [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X' α c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c) =
identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
 apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C)
  [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z X X' α c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# H
  (post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
   · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
# H (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]

post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
· pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α =

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
∏ x : C,
(post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
 · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) x =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
(post_whisker_in_funcat C C C (nat_trans_id Z) X
 · pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α) c =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) α c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
# (pr1 X) (identity (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X, X': [C, C]
α: [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧
c: C
identity (X (Z c)) · pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) =
pr1 α (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

    apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧

IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
EndEndC
⟦ CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C] [C, C] 
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C] Ptd 
               [C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
         (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg 
         [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
         (θ_target H) Z)) 
   (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) t) ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
nat_trans_data
  (CPEndEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
[C, C]
⟦ CPEndEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_target H) Z) X, (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) X ⟧

    exact (nat_trans_id ((@BinCoproductObject EndC _ (θ_target H (X⊗Z)) (CPEndC _ _) )
            : functor C C)).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (CPEndEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat),
 is_nat_trans
   (CPEndEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat) t)
  ((λ X : [C, C],
    nat_trans_id
      (CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
            X) (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z))
       :
       C ⟶ C))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (CPEndEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z)) (ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat))
 exact (is_nat_trans_iso2' Z).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, U (ptd_from_alg InitAlg) ⟧
EndEndC ⟦ Id_H ∙ ℓ (U Z), ℓ (U Z) ∙ Ghat ⟧

  exact (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z).
Defined.



Local Notation "C '^op'" := (opp_precat C) (format "C ^op").

Let Yon (X : EndC) : functor EndC^op HSET := yoneda_objects EndC X.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X

b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg

Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) t) 
  ?pr1

GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
