  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
  (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
Y: [C, C]^op
SET ⟦ (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y,
(functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) Y ⟧

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
Y: [C, C]^op
a: Sets.pr1hSet
  ((functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y)
Sets.pr1hSet ((functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) Y)

    exact (a · b).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
Z: Ptd
X: [C, C]
b: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 InitAlg, X ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
   (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) t)
  ((λ Y : [C, C]^op,
    (λ a : Sets.pr1hSet
             ((functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
               ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y), a · b)
    :
    SET
    ⟦ (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)) Y,
    (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X) Y ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon X))
 abstract (
    intros ? ? ?; simpl;
    apply funextsec;
    intro;
    unfold yoneda_objects_ob; simpl;
    unfold compose;
    simpl;
    apply nat_trans_eq; [ apply homset_property |];
    simpl; intro; apply assoc').
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
ishssMor C CP H
  (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')
   :
   algebra_mor Id_H InitAlg T')


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
ishssMor C CP H
  (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')
   :
   algebra_mor Id_H InitAlg T')

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
isbracketMor C CP H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧),
fbracket InitHSS Z f · InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') =
InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f
     · # U
         (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H)
            (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'))))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
fbracket InitHSS Z f · InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') =
InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f
     · # U
         (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H)
            (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'))))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β0 =
β0 •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
pr1 (pr1 X) =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧

β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧

  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat

  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')

[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat

  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C]

     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β =
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS Z f)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS Z f) = pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS Z f · β =
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS Z f)
 apply idpath.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS Z f) = pr1 (pr1 X)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS Z f) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
?b = pr1 (pr1 X)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
?b = pr1 (pr1 X)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA

      (* hypothesis of fusion law *)
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
homotsec (Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA)) (Φ `IA · Psi' `IA)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
(Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA)) t = (Φ `IA · Psi' `IA) t

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
((λ f0 : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `InitAlg
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA),
  BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
    (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
       (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
    (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
    (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
  · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
      (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
         (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z)
      (CPEndEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z))
      (identity
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z)))
      (θ_in_first_arg Z
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
