              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
  · nat_trans_id
      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
         (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
  · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
      (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
      (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)) H
      (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) `InitAlg f0
  · ρ_Thm15 Z f)
 · (λ a : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
            (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                  [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H
                  `IA)), a · β)) t =
((λ a : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
          (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA), a · β)
 · (λ f0 : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `(pr1 T')
             (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA),
    BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
      (CPEndC (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
         (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
      (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
      (nat_trans_id
         (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA)))
    · coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z)
        (CPEndEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z))
        (constant_nat_trans [C, C] [C, C] (pr1 Z)
           (pr1 InitAlg) f
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (CPEndEndC
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (pr1 InitAlg))
                (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                   (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                   (θ_target H) Z)))
        (θ_in_first_arg Z
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CPEndEndC
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (pr1 InitAlg))
                (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                   (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                   (θ_target H) Z))) `IA
    · nat_trans_id
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))
    · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg)) H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) `(pr1 T') f0
    · rhohat)) t

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
pr2 (pr2 hset_precategory_data)
  (Sets.make_hSet
     (yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (functor_category_has_homsets C C C
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) (pr1 InitAlg)))
  (Sets.make_hSet
     (yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA)))
     (functor_category_has_homsets C C C
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
        (pr1 InitAlg)))
  (Sets.make_hSet
     (yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `(pr1 T')
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA)))
     (functor_category_has_homsets C C C
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
        `(pr1 T')))
  (λ f0 : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `InitAlg
            (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA),
   pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        H `InitAlg) `InitAlg
     (pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H `InitAlg)
        (pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C]
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z)) H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                    [C, C]
                    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                       CP)
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (functor_identity C))
                    H `IA))
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C] CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_source H) Z) `IA)
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C] CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H `IA))))
              (coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
                 CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_source H) Z)
                 (CPEndEndC
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_target H) Z))
                 (pr2
                    (pr2
                       (functor_precategory_data
                          (functor_precategory_data C
                             C) [C, C, C]))
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                    (identity
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)))
                    (BinCoproductIn1
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 (pr2
                    (pr2
                       (functor_precategory_data
                          (functor_precategory_data C
                             C) [C, C, C]))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_source H) Z)
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_target H) Z)
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                    (θ_in_first_arg Z)
                    (BinCoproductIn2
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 `IA))
           (nat_trans_id
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           `InitAlg f0)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f))
  (λ a : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C]
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (functor_identity C)) H `IA)),
   pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
     (pr1 InitAlg) `(pr1 T') a β) t =
pr2 (pr2 hset_precategory_data)
  (Sets.make_hSet
     (yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (functor_category_has_homsets C C C
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) (pr1 InitAlg)))
  (Sets.make_hSet
     (yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `(pr1 T')
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (functor_category_has_homsets C C C
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) `(pr1 T')))
  (Sets.make_hSet
     (yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `(pr1 T')
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA)))
     (functor_category_has_homsets C C C
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
        `(pr1 T')))
  (λ a : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA),
   pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) (pr1 InitAlg)
     `(pr1 T') a β)
  (λ f0 : yoneda_objects_ob [C, C] `(pr1 T')
            (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA),
   pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg)) H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T')
     (pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg)) H `(pr1 T'))
        (pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C]
                 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (functor_identity C)) H `IA))
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg)) H
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (pr2 (pr2 (functor_precategory_data C C))
              (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                 (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                    [C, C]
                    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C
                       CP)
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (functor_identity C))
                    H `IA))
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C] CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_source H) Z) `IA)
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C]
                 [C, C] CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H `IA))))
              (coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
                 CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_source H) Z)
                 (CPEndEndC
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_target H) Z))
                 (pr2
                    (pr2
                       (functor_precategory_data
                          (functor_precategory_data C
                             C) [C, C, C]))
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                    (constant_nat_trans [C, C] [C, C]
                       (pr1 Z) (pr1 InitAlg) f)
                    (BinCoproductIn1
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 (pr2
                    (pr2
                       (functor_precategory_data
                          (functor_precategory_data C
                             C) [C, C, C]))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_source H) Z)
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_target H) Z)
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))
                    (θ_in_first_arg Z)
                    (BinCoproductIn2
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 `IA))
           (nat_trans_id
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg)) H
           (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) `(pr1 T') f0))
     rhohat) t
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_comp
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H `IA))))
              (coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
                 CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_source H) Z)
                 (CPEndEndC
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_target H) Z))
                 (nat_trans_comp
                    (identity
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)))
                    (BinCoproductIn1
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 (nat_trans_comp (θ_in_first_arg Z)
                    (BinCoproductIn2
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 `IA))
           (nat_trans_id
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           `InitAlg t)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)) β =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
              (CPEndC
                 (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
                 (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
              (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
              (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                    (H `IA))))
           (coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_source H) Z)
              (CPEndEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_target H) Z))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (constant_nat_trans [C, C] [C, C]
                    (pr1 Z) (pr1 InitAlg) f)
                 (BinCoproductIn1
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
              (nat_trans_comp (θ_in_first_arg Z)
                 (BinCoproductIn2
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
              `IA))
        (nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg)) H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) `(pr1 T')
        (nat_trans_comp t β))) rhohat

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_comp
              (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
                 (CPEndC
                    (functor_compose (pr1 Z)
                       (id1_CAT C)) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
                 (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                       (H `IA))))
              (coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
                 CPEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 Z))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_source H) Z)
                 (CPEndEndC
                    (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                       [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                       (θ_target H) Z))
                 (nat_trans_comp
                    (identity
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 Z)))
                    (BinCoproductIn1
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 (nat_trans_comp (θ_in_first_arg Z)
                    (BinCoproductIn2
                       (CPEndEndC
                          (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                             [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
                          (functor_fix_snd_arg
                             [C, C, C]
                             (precategory_Ptd C)
                             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
                 `IA))
           (nat_trans_id
              (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
                 (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))))
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z)) H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA)
           `InitAlg t)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)) β x =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (BinCoproductOfArrows [C, C]
              (CPEndC
                 (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
                 (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
              (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
              (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z))
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z)
                    (H `IA))))
           (coproduct_nat_trans_data [C, C] [C, C]
              CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 Z))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_source H) Z)
              (CPEndEndC
                 (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                    (pr1 InitAlg))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                    (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                    (θ_target H) Z))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (constant_nat_trans [C, C] [C, C]
                    (pr1 Z) (pr1 InitAlg) f)
                 (BinCoproductIn1
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
              (nat_trans_comp (θ_in_first_arg Z)
                 (BinCoproductIn2
                    (CPEndEndC
                       (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                          [C, C, C] (pr1 InitAlg))
                       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                          (precategory_Ptd C)
                          [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z))))
              `IA))
        (nat_trans_id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)))))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg)) H
        (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) `(pr1 T')
        (nat_trans_comp t β))) rhohat x

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
∏ x : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  x
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) x
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) x)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg)))
    (# H t
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg))) x
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) x · β x =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  x
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (pr1 InitAlg))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) x
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) x)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) x
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) x

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg)))
    (# H t
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (pr1 InitAlg))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg)))
    (# H t
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (pr1 InitAlg))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg))
    (identity (pr1 Z)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg)))
    (# H t
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
            (H `InitAlg))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)
    `InitAlg f
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
     · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (pr1 InitAlg))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

      (* should be decomposed into two diagrams *)
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
       (# H t
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
