ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
          [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
          [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
             [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
            [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C, C] 
               (precategory_Ptd C) 
               [C, C, C] 
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
            [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C, C] 
               (precategory_Ptd C) 
               [C, C, C] 
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP 
          (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
       (# H t
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · 
   β c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
          [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
          [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
             [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
            [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C, C] 
               (precategory_Ptd C) 
               [C, C, C] 
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
            [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C, C] 
               (precategory_Ptd C) 
               [C, C, C] 
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) 
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) 
               (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) 
               (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β 
       (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
       (# H t
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 Z))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
          (H `InitAlg))
       (identity (pr1 Z)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
       (# H t
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
        · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 Z))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 Z))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))
           (identity (pr1 Z)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
           (# H t
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
         · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
              (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
              (BinCoproductIn2
                 (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                    (H `InitAlg))
               · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c)))) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
           c · β c))) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
           c · β c))) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
           c · β c))) =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 Z))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg)))
        (# H t
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 Z) (H `InitAlg))) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
           (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
                 (H `InitAlg)) · alg_map Id_H InitAlg)
           c · β c))) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg)))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
         · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c)) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C] (pr1 Z))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg)))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
         · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c)) =
(f
 · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (pr1 InitAlg))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
     `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg)))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
         · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c)) =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA)
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg)))
     (# H t
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
             (H `InitAlg))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
         · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c)) =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
(identity (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
identity (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H `InitAlg) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (H `InitAlg) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
f c · β c =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
     (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
     (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧

  (τ T')

[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat

  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))

  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))

⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)

f c · β c =
f c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z

   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))

           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))

         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H (nat_trans_comp t β)
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
