t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
# H t c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H `InitAlg) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
(# H t · # H β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
# H t c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (H `InitAlg) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =
# H t c · # H β c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
# H t c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
         · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c)) =
# H t c
· (# H β c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

H: Presignature C C C

⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))

⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C

  (H `InitAlg) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H `InitAlg) `InitAlg f

      · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c) =

· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg))
 · alg_map Id_H InitAlg) c · β c =
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `InitAlg) c
· alg_map Id_H InitAlg c · β c =
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `InitAlg c))
· alg_map Id_H InitAlg c · β c =
# H β c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
Hyp: # H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) · τ (pr1 T') =
τ IA · InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `InitAlg c))
· alg_map Id_H InitAlg c · β c =
# H β c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
Hyp_c: (# H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) · τ (pr1 T'))
  c = (τ IA · InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `InitAlg c))
· alg_map Id_H InitAlg c · β c =
# H β c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
Hyp_c: # H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T') c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `IA) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) IA c
· InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `InitAlg c))
· alg_map Id_H InitAlg c · β c =
# H β c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
Hyp_c: # H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T') c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `IA) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) IA c
· InitialArrow IA (pr1 T') c
# H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c) =
# H β c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
# H (InitialArrow IA (pr1 T')) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
          (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c) =
# H β c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (β c) (τ (pr1 T') c)

            
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (β c) (τ (pr1 T') c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c

            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
          
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
H_nat_inst_c: # H (t · β) c = (# H t · # H β) c
(# H t · # H β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c =
# H (nat_trans_comp t β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
t: Sets.pr1hSet
  (ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
     (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) `IA)
c: C
H_nat_inst_c: # H (t · β) c = (# H t · # H β) c
# H (t · β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c =
# H (nat_trans_comp t β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

            apply idpath.
        }
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ `InitHSS (fbracket InitHSS Z f) =
Φ `IA
  (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     (KanExt Z) Psi)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
TT:= fusion_law [C, C] Id_H IA 
  [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) `T' 
  (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
     ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H 
         [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) 
         (ℓ (U Z))) (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
ψ `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) ψ) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
Psi:= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z)) 
  (Const_plus_H (U Z)) (ρ_Thm15 Z f)
  (aux_iso_1 Z · θ'_Thm15 Z · aux_iso_2_inv Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `InitAlg (ℓ (U Z))
T2:= TT Psi: ∏ (L' : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C])
(is_left_adj_L' : Core.is_left_adjoint L')
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' L'
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' L')
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp L' ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' L' is_left_adj_L'
    ψ'
T3:= T2 (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z): ∏
(ψ' : ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
      ⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)))
(Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
     ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
     ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
       ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T'),
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · ψ' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) ψ'
Psi':= ψ_from_comps [C, C] Id_H 
  [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z)) Ghat rhohat
  (iso1' Z · thetahat_0 Z f · iso2' Z): ψ_source [C, C] [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
⟹ ψ_target [C, C] Id_H [C, C] `T' (ℓ (U Z))
T4:= T3 Psi': ∏
Φ : functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
    ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg)
    ⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z))
      ∙ yoneda_objects [C, C] `T',
Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
Φ:= Phi_fusion Z `T' β: functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon (pr1 InitAlg)
⟹ functor_opp (ℓ (U Z)) ∙ Yon `T'
T5:= T4 Φ: Psi `IA · Φ (Id_H `IA) = Φ `IA · Psi' `IA
→ Φ `IA
    (It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z)) 
       (KanExt Z) Psi) =
  It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] `T' 
    (ℓ (U Z)) (KanExt Z) Psi'
fbracket InitHSS Z f =
It [C, C] Id_H IA [C, C] (pr1 InitAlg) (ℓ (U Z))
  (KanExt Z) Psi

      apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
pr1 (pr1 X) =
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
β •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)) =
pr1 (pr1 X)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
· (β •• U Z
   · fbracket T' Z
       (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))) =
thetahat Z f `IA
· # Ghat
    (β •• U Z
     · fbracket T' Z
         (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)))
· rhohat

    (* now a lot of serious verification work to be done *)
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
∏ x : C,
(# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
 · (β •• U Z
    · fbracket T' Z
        (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))))
  x =
(thetahat Z f `IA
 · # Ghat
     (β •• U Z
      · fbracket T' Z
          (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)))
 · rhohat) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
(# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA)
 · (β •• U Z
    · fbracket T' Z
        (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0))))
  c =
(thetahat Z f `IA
 · # Ghat
     (β •• U Z
      · fbracket T' Z
          (f · # U (# (ptd_from_alg_functor CP H) β0)))
 · rhohat) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (pr1 InitAlg))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· identity
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (pr1 Z ∙ `IA)) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H
       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
        · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
  (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
  (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
   · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
  c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
       `IA)
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (pr1 InitAlg))
       (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z)
       `IA)
    (f
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA)
    (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
       (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
     · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
         CPEndC
         (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
            (pr1 InitAlg))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
            (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
            Z) `IA) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
    (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H `(pr1 T')))
    (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
    (# H
       (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
        · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
            (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
    (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c

    (* look at type: *)
(*        match goal with | [ |- ?l = _ ] => let ty:= (type of l) in idtac ty end. *)
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
          [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
          [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg 
             [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
             [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data 
            [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C, C] 
               (precategory_Ptd C) 
               [C, C, C] 
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
          [C, C] Ptd [C, C] 
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data 
            [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
            (constant_functor 
               [C, C, C] 
               [C, C, C] 
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg 
               [C, C, C] 
               (precategory_Ptd C) 
               [C, C, C] 
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 InitAlg) (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) 
          (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) 
               (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) 
               (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β 
       (τ (pr1 T')) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H
              (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
               · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
(runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
identity (pr1 Z c)
· BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     ((f
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
          · BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
        ((# H
            (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
             · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (τ (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     ((f
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
          · BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
        ((# H
            (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
             · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (τ (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
(f
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA))) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
     ((# H
         (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
          · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
f c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
