     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
f c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `IA) c
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H)
               (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
f c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP 
     (pr1 InitAlg)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
        [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
        [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA) c
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) 
             (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) 
             (H `(pr1 T')) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) 
          (β c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) 
             (H `(pr1 T')) c
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
                  [C, C] 
                  [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     (functor_identity C)) H) 
               (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
f c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `IA) c
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
             (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H)
               (pr1 T') c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA)
  c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (H `(pr1 T')) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (β c)
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)

           
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
  (H `(pr1 T')) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (β c)
    (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
       (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 = β c

           apply idpath. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) = f c · β c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c =
f c · β c

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c =
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg

Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧

β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧

  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b = f c · β c

  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧

  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat

· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c =

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) = ?f'

        
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
ptd_mor_commutes_inst: ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg IA)
  (pr1 Z c)
· ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0
    (pr1 Z c) =
ptd_pt C
  (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T'))
  (pr1 Z c)
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) = ?f'

        apply ptd_mor_commutes_inst. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c = f c · β c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
fbracket_η_inst: f · # U (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0) =
η T' •• U Z
· fbracket T' Z
    (f
     · # U
         (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c = f c · β c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
fbracket_η_inst_c: (f
 · # U
     (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H β0))
  c =
(η T' •• U Z
 · fbracket T' Z
     (f
      · # U
          (ptd_from_alg_mor C CP H
             β0))) c
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T')) (pr1 Z c)
· fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c = f c · β c

      apply (!fbracket_η_inst_c).
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
          `IA)
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (f
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
       (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
          (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
        · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
            CPEndC
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (pr1 InitAlg))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
               (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
               (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
       (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
       (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
        · BinCoproductIn1
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
       (# H
          (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
           · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
        · BinCoproductIn2
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
               (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
       (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (id1_CAT C))
     (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))
     (runitor_CAT (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA)))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C]
           CPEndC
           (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
              (pr1 InitAlg))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
              (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
              (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (f
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
        (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (pr1 InitAlg))
             (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
           (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
           (# H
              (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
               · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                   (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
         · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
             (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 Z c)) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
(nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data (pr1 Z) (H `IA))
 · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA))) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
identity (H `IA (pr1 Z c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H) Z
        `IA)
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z) `IA)
     (f
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA)
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data [C, C] [C, C]
          CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (pr1 InitAlg))
          (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
             (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
             (θ_target H) Z) `IA) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA))
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
           (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))
        (identity (pr1 InitAlg)
         · BinCoproductIn1
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T'))))
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP `InitAlg
          (H `(pr1 T')) `(pr1 T') β (τ (pr1 T')) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
identity (H `IA (pr1 Z c))
· BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     ((f
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
          · BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
        ((# H
            (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
             · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (τ (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) ((pr1 Z ∙ H `IA) c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_source H)
           Z `IA c))
     ((f
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
     ((nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
         (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (CPEndC
              (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                 (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
              (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
                 (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C]
                 (θ_target H) Z `IA))) c)
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
          · BinCoproductIn1
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
        ((# H
            (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
             · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
          · BinCoproductIn2
              (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
                 (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (τ (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
   (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `IA
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA))) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
     ((# H
         (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
          · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
(θ (`IA,, Z)
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (pr1 InitAlg) `IA)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA))) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     ((identity (pr1 InitAlg)
       · BinCoproductIn1
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
     ((# H
         (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
          · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0))
       · BinCoproductIn2
           (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
              (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')))) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (τ (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 InitAlg)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
       `IA) c
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
          (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T')) c
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
          (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
          `IA c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA c))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (functor_identity C c)
                (H `(pr1 T') c))
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H)
               (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
           [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
           [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `IA c))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) 
             (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) 
          (β c)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (functor_identity C c)
                (H `(pr1 T') c))
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
                  [C, C] 
                  [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     [C, C, C] 
                     (functor_identity C)) H) 
               (pr1 T') c)))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?b =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
           (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H)
           Z `IA c))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
           (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
        (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
         · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
             (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
        (# H
           (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
            · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
         · BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (functor_identity C c)
                (H `(pr1 T') c))
           · alg_map
               (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
                  (constant_functor [C, C, C]
                     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H)
               (pr1 T') c)))
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `IA c))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c)
        (H (functor_compose (pr1 Z) `IA) c))
     (identity (pr1 (pr1 InitAlg) c)
      · coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
          (pr1 InitAlg) (H `(pr1 T')) c)
     (# H
        (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
         · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c)) (β c)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
        · alg_map
            (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
               (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                  (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

           
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
# H
  (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
   · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
· BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (β c)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)

EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC

?t1 =

· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (pr1 InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
   · BinCoproductArrow

               (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET

Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧

β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧

  (τ T')

[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧

# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =

?t1 =

· BinCoproductArrow (CP (`InitAlg c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
    (β c)

       (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
     · alg_map
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
            (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
            (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
               (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c)

           
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
?t1 =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
       (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c

           apply idpath.
      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c)) =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
EndEndC:= [[C, C], [C, C]]: category
CPEndEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
KanExt: ∏ Z : Ptd,
GlobalRightKanExtensionExists C C (U Z) C
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Const_plus_H:= λ X : [C, C],
SubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H C CP H
  X: [C, C] → [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IA: Initial Alg
Yon:= λ X : [C, C], yoneda_objects [C, C] X: [C, C] → [C, C]^op ⟶ SET
T': hss CP H
Z: Ptd
f: [C, C] ⟦ U Z, `InitHSS ⟧
β0:= InitialArrow IA (pr1 T'): Alg ⟦ IA, pr1 T' ⟧
β:= β0: [C, C] ⟦ `InitHSS, `T' ⟧
rhohat:= BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC `InitHSS (H `T')) β
  (τ T')
:
[C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 Ghat `T', `T' ⟧
X:= SpecializedGMIt Z `T' Ghat rhohat (thetahat Z f): ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ ℓ (U Z) `IA, `T' ⟧,
# (ℓ (U Z)) (alg_map Id_H IA) · h =
thetahat Z f `IA · # Ghat h · rhohat
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `IA (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H IA) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· pr1 β (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0) c =
θ (`IA,, Z) c
· (# H
     (pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) β
      · fbracket T' Z (f · pr1 β0)) c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `(pr1 T') c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T') c))

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC: BinCoproducts EndEndC
